abilities.name: Adorable Doll
abilities.description: Indistinguishable from normal doll when not moving.

abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: May use Grace instead of Might for Melee/Pugilism attacks.

abilities.name: Malice Aura
abilities.description: When Living suffers damage from non-Poison source within a1, also gains Poison +1.

actions: (1) Knife (Melee) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. Crow Hamstring: +1 damage, falls Prone, gains Useless Limb (Legs) until healed.

(1) Thrown Needles (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 5M (10M) | Rg: z9 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/1/1B damage. No randomize in engagement. Mask Attached Threads: After succeeding, push character into contact with target.
(1) All Sewed Up | Target other Doll within 1 yard heals 1 damage and gains New Threads Condition 24 hours (gains + to attacks).
system.notes: Voodoo dolls filled with hatred and spite. Sewn from burlap, cloth, or human flesh anointed with target blood. Creep into homes to stab victims in sleep. Use bundles of needles as weapons.
